name: Tortilla Soup -1
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil chicken breasts in 3 quarts of water for approximately 30 minutes.
2. Remove and reserve the stock. Shred the chicken breasts.
3. Saute chopped onion, celery, garlic, peppers, and tomatoes. Add spices and masa to the vegetables and stir.
4. Add shredded chicken and vegetable mixture to the reserved chicken stock. Simmer for 1 hour.
5. Cut and fry strips or wedges of corn tortillas in oil in a skillet. Drain well.
6. To serve soup, garnish with tortilla chips and grated cheese (optional).
